continuity.evidence: Paws, lower torso, baseline, body scale, flank patch, tail attachment, face identity, and anatomical markings remain stable while head and eye motion advances through all sixteen directions without reversal, crop, or scale pop.

blind_validation.evidence: Strict majority of three isolated reviewers correctly classified all fourteen horizontal and vertical A/B challenges, including both hard cardinal gates.

final_visual_qa.evidence: All 16 labeled directions read correctly in clockwise order with clear cardinals, planted paws, no reversal, and blind validation passing.
final_visual_qa.warnings: Benign negative-space alpha-hole flags and continuity metric outliers, chiefly 337.5 to 000, are visually natural foreshortening without a snap or broken silhouette.
